description: lib/README.md §3 'Per-domain READMEs' list at L31 includes only 2 of 3 sub-READMEs (lib/council/, lib/coverage-graph/) — omits lib/deep-loop/README.md despite §2 LIBRARY DOMAINS table at L22-26 listing all 3 domains. A reader following the per-domain README link list as an index would miss the deep-loop sub-README.
recommended_patch: Update lib/README.md:31 to: 'Per-domain READMEs: lib/council/README.md, lib/coverage-graph/README.md, lib/deep-loop/README.md'

description: Catalog+playbook narrow description to 'appends degraded verification events when optional checks fail' but source covers broader scope: iteration markdown validation, JSONL validation, delta validation, multi-stage verification with confidence scoring. Description over-specializes on one function (runOptionalVerificationPass) of 4 exported. Continues the description-drift-catalog-vs-source class-of-bug from DR-025 (fallback-router) and DR-026 (bayesian-scorer); 3 of 7 sampled (43% prevalence) crosses high-prevalence threshold.
recommended_patch: Update catalog F005 description + playbook DLR-005 §1 OVERVIEW to: 'Validates iteration artifacts after dispatch — including iteration markdown, JSONL state, and delta — with optional verification-pass execution and a weighted confidence score for review-depth gates.'
